_doc: Top-level Wall sample — matches the path quoted in `phases/PHASE-1A-Q1-M1-M3-SKELETON-RAILS.md` line 248 verbatim. The sub-folder `wall/` carries the multi-case fixtures (straight / curved / arc) used by the S07-S09 30-case parity matrix; this single file is the canonical S01-T7 'extracted from a real PRYZM-1 project save' anchor that the schemas round-trip test asserts against.
